manga.title: Dream⭐︎Jumbo⭐︎Girl
manga.description:
Chie is an ordinary high school girl who is doing her best to study to secure a nice life for herself. Her best friend Kana agrees and decides to help secure a bright future for Chie by buying 100 lottery tickets. But as it turns out, one hit the grand prize?

What will these two girls do when they have 700 million yen (approx. $4 million) to their name?
